column1: Soft smile hiding ruthless intention
Expression unreadable like a locked door
Deadpan face with quiet supernatural pressure
Slow smirk like she knows your name
Blank stare like sleepwalking trance
Gentle smile with dangerous undertone
Icy calm expression perfectly controlled
Slight pout like boredom turned lethal
Twitch of a smile then nothing
Eyes wide mouth relaxed wrongness
Tense lips pressed flat restrained rage
Faint grin like a private curse
Sorrowful look beautiful and unsettling
Anger held back behind polite stillness
Calm face while eyes burn sharp
Expression frozen like a paused frame
Laughing quietly without moving the eyes
Soft innocence masking sharpened instincts
Suspicious look like she sensed betrayal
Serene face like temple silence at night
